mutation: composite: prize-collecting single-drone pickup-delivery tour under Chebyshev flight metric with a NEW freshness/carry penalty -- choose which precedence+capacity-constrained pairs to serve and order them so that flight distance, per-onboard-stop wilting cost, and skip penalties are jointly minimized (batching shortens flight but lengthens carry time, creating a trade-off absent from plain selective PDP-TSP)
title: Rooftop Garden Seedling Relay: Fresh Pickup-and-Delivery Drone Tour
strategies: serve-nobody baseline: output an empty tour, cost = total penalty (calibration point at ratio 0.1)
solo-benefit greedy: serve requests whose skip-penalty exceeds their standalone Chebyshev round-trip, delivered immediately after pickup (zero wilting), concatenated in input order

marginal cheapest-insertion: insert each pickup-delivery pair adjacently at the flight-cheapest gap, charging the extra wilting inflicted on requests already on board, accepting only net-negative insertions
insertion + remove-and-reinsert local search: repeatedly drop each served pair and reinsert it (or leave it out) to trade flight distance, carry-freshness, and skip penalties against each other
